scripts.check: node --check app/www/app.js && node --check app/www/fx.js && node --check app/www/store.js && node --check app/www/creature.js && node --check app/www/icons.js
scripts.serve: npm run sync:shared && python -m http.server 4173 --directory app/www
scripts.cap:sync: npm run sync:shared && cap sync android
